data.author: Senior Airman Andrew Garavito
data.title: T Triple-C Drills [Image 4 of 4]
data.description: U.S. Air Force Airmen from the 824th Base Defense Squadron and the 11th Combat Air Base Squadron move a simulated patient to practice tactical combat casualty care at Andersen Air Force Base, Guam, Nov. 7, 2025. The 824th BDS’ primary mission is to provide integrated and responsive forces to provide air base ground defense, and its members have utilized their skills during their six-month deployment with the 11th Air Task Force. (U.S. Air Force photo by Senior Airman Saidlere Belle)

data.author: Senior Airman Andrew Garavito
data.title: T Triple-C Drills [Image 3 of 4]
data.description: U.S. Air Force Airmen from the 824th Base Defense Squadron and the 11th Combat Air Base Squadron triage a simulated patient during tactical combat casualty care at Andersen Air Force Base, Guam, Nov. 7, 2025. The 824th BDS' focus on austere air base defense provides the joint force with a capability specifically tailored to enabling Agile Combat Employment air operations, which the 11th Air Task Force has been practicing during its six-month deployment in the Pacific. (U.S. Air Force photo by Senior Airman Saidlere Belle)

data.author: Senior Airman Andrew Garavito
data.title: T Triple-C Drills [Image 2 of 4]
data.description: U.S. Air Force Airmen from the 824th Base Defense Squadron and the 11th Combat Air Base Squadron ruck across a road and field to reach another tactical training point at Andersen Air Force Base, Guam, Nov. 7, 2025. The 824th BDS' focus on austere air base defense provides the joint force with a capability specifically tailored to enabling Agile Combat Employment air operations, which the 11th Air Task Force has been practicing during its six-month deployment in the Pacific. (U.S. Air Force photo by Senior Airman Saidlere Belle)

data.author: Senior Airman Andrew Garavito
data.title: T Triple-C Drills [Image 1 of 4]
data.description: U.S. Air Force Airmen from the 824th Base Defense Squadron and the 11th Combat Air Base Squadron tie a rope around a light pole before practicing zipline drills at Andersen Air Force Base, Guam, Nov. 7, 2025. The 824th BDS’ primary mission is to provide integrated and responsive forces to provide air base ground defense, and its members have utilized their skills during their six-month deployment with the 11th Air Task Force. (U.S. Air Force photo by Senior Airman Saidlere Belle)
